title: 150 Pcs Blank Kraft Cards Paper, Pink Flash Cards Blank, Business Message Cards, Craft Words Cards Paper for DIY Card Making, Learning, Memory, Note, Gift Tags - 3.46x2.04 inch/8.8x5.2 cm
features: 【Premium Material】The blank business cards are made of outstanding paper material, easy to write, not easy to fade and deform, smooth and comfortable surface. The surface of the paper card is flat and has a certain friction, suitable for easy and smooth writing on it.

【Easy to Write】These flash cards blank are study and thick enough. The handwriting is not easy to penetrate and is delicate and smooth. You can use pencils, pens, ballpoint pens, gel pens or other markers to write.
【Double-sided Writable】You can leave everything that you want to express on both side of the flash cards. Both sides of the craft papers can easily allow pen ink. Also easy to carry.

【Wide Applications】The black flash memory cards can be used for DIY hand-painted graffiti, message memo cards, word cards, baby character cards, bookmark cards, and also for embossing business cards, which can be used in schools, homes, offices and other occasions.

【Package Includes】The package contains 150 pcs pink kraft paper cards with a size of 3.46 x 2.04 inch /8.8 x 5.2 cm, which is a universal basic size. Equipped with a box for storage, so you don't have to worry about using it all out at once.
